heading: Claim for replacement
label: 17304 Claim for replacement
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)17304(a), (b)(1)40:723 (1st sentence).(1st sentence, 2d sentence words before 2d proviso), .July 8, 1937, ch. 444, § 350 Stat. 47917304(b)(2)40:723 (2d sentence 1st proviso).17304(c)40:723 (2d sentence words before 1st proviso).In subsection (c), the words “Notwithstanding any provision of law to the contrary” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Presentation of Claim
children.label: a .—Presentation of Claim
children.text: When valuables that have been shipped in accordance with regulations prescribed under are lost, destroyed, or damaged, a claim in writing for replacement shall be made on the Secretary of the Treasury.section 17302 of this title

children.heading: Decision of the Secretary of the Treasury.—
children.label: b Decision of the Secretary of the Treasury.—

children.heading: .—Replacement made from fund
children.label: 1 .—Replacement made from fund
children.text: If the Secretary is satisfied that the loss, destruction, or damage has occurred and that shipment was made substantially in accordance with the regulations, the Secretary shall have replacement be made out of the fund described in through an officer the Secretary designates.section 17303 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: certify the decision to the Comptroller General who, on receiving the certification, shall make the credit in the settlement of accounts in the Government Accountability Office; and

children.label: B
children.text: use the fund only to the extent that the replacement cannot be made by the credit.

children.heading: .—Decision of Secretary Not Reviewable
children.label: c .—Decision of Secretary Not Reviewable
children.text: The decision of the Secretary that a loss, destruction, or damage has occurred or that a shipment was made substantially in accordance with regulations is final and conclusive and is not subject to review by any other officer of the Government.
